title: Existing company list input (Qualify a List)
description: Input format for qualify_existing_list.py. Each item can be a plain company name, or an object with more detail. Mixing both forms in the same array is allowed.

oneOf.description: A bare company name, e.g. "Acme Corp".

website.description: If known, pass this through so phase 3 does not have to search for it first.
